problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
